rgpd.title: Before we start
rgpd.description: Lunestia needs a few pieces of personal data to work. Here's exactly what we collect and what we do with it.

dataItems.title: Your email address
dataItems.desc: Collected via Google or Apple sign-in to identify your account.

dataItems.title: Your first name
dataItems.desc: Optional — used only to personalize messages from Lyra.

dataItems.title: Your birth data
dataItems.desc: Date, time, and city — to calculate your natal chart and transits.

rgpd.thirdParties: Your birth data is transmitted to OpenAI to generate your astrological analyses. It is never sold, never used for advertising, and never shared with any other third party.
rgpd.checkTerms: I accept the terms of use and the
rgpd.checkAI: I accept that my birth data be transmitted to OpenAI solely to generate my personalized astrological analyses

helpTip.title: Help is everywhere
helpTip.description: On every page, a ? button gives you explanations for what you're seeing — symbols, scores, aspects, all decoded.

birth.title: Your natal chart
birth.subtitle: This data is used to calculate your personal transits and precise natal chart.

done.title: You're all set
done.subtitle: Your natal chart is saved. All features are now unlocked.

transitsOnboarding.step1Body: The Transits page is divided into 3 tabs. Navigate between them to discover your astral influences from different angles.
transitsOnboarding.step2Body: Your 3 next significant transits, ranked by intensity. Each shows a date, theme, and its influence on your natal chart.
transitsOnboarding.step3Body: Visualize your planetary aspects day by day. Colored dots indicate the type of active aspect. Tap a day to see details and get an interpretation.
transitsOnboarding.step4Body: Slide the cursor to explore your transits at any age — past or future. Perfect for understanding the key periods of your life.
transitsOnboarding.step5Body: Don't know a term? This button opens a complete guide with explanations for every aspect and planet.
